title: FAQ - Membership & Account
content:
Membership & Account FAQs:

Q: Can I join as a reseller?
A: Yes, if you work in the sign & display industry. Visit the Login/Register page and complete the registration form after reading the Terms and Conditions. WS Display is a B2B wholesaler serving resellers and distributors.

Q: Are there hidden fees?
A: No, membership is completely free. There are no monthly or annual fees.

Q: How do I create an account?
A: Click Login/Register, then click 'New Member?' and complete Steps 1 & 2. You will need to submit required business documents. Activation typically occurs within an hour of submitting required documents.

Q: How do I log in?
A: Enter your email and password on the login page, or click 'My Account' from any page on the website.

Q: I forgot my password. What do I do?
A: Click 'Forgot my password' on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the prompts sent to your email to reset your password.

Q: How do I edit my account information?
A: Log into 'My Account,' then modify any details as needed including contact information, shipping addresses, and billing details.

Q: Can multiple people from one company share a login?
A: Yes, sharing login credentials is permitted, or you can create separate logins for each person in your company.

Q: How do I see my wish list?
A: Go to My Account, select 'Product Lists,' then click 'View My List' to see items you have saved.

Q: How do I view pricing on the website?
A: You must be logged in to your account to view wholesale pricing. Pricing is not visible to non-members or logged-out users.

title: FAQ - Products, Materials & Warranty
content:
Products, Materials & Warranty FAQs:

Q: How do I view pricing?
A: You must log in to your account to view pricing. Wholesale pricing is only visible to registered, logged-in members.

Q: Do you have Fabric Care Instructions and Fire Certificates?
A: Yes, both are available on the certificate page at wsdisplay.com/certificate. Fire certificates are available for all fabric types including stretch fabric, multi-stretch fabric, mesh fabric, black and white fabric, dye sub backlit fabric, scrim vinyl, and tent fabric.

Q: Do you have product warranty information?
A: Yes, warranty details appear on individual product pages. WS Display offers two warranty types: 1-Year Warranty and Lifetime Warranty against manufacturing defects. Check the specific product page for which warranty applies.

Q: Do you have a structural integrity statement?
A: Yes, a structural integrity engineer stamp is available as a downloadable PDF, particularly for hanging banner products.

Q: What is your warranty?
A: WS Display offers two types of warranties: 1-Year Warranty and Lifetime Warranty, both against manufacturing defects. The specific warranty varies by product and is listed on each product page. For example, select SilverStep retractable banner stands carry a lifetime warranty.

Q: What materials do you print on?
A: WS Display prints on a wide range of materials including stretch fabric, multi-stretch fabric, black and white fabric, blockout fabric, dye sub backlit fabric, mesh fabric, scrim vinyl, super flat vinyl, backlit film, fence mesh fabric, tent fabric, and UV backlit fabric.

Q: What product categories do you carry?
A: Main categories include: Retractable Banner Stands, Trade Show Booths, Fabric Displays, SEG Extrusions (Resort Collection), Flags & Outdoor Displays, Table Throws, Indoor Banner Stands, Canopy Tents, Home Goods (towels, blankets, canvas frames), Custom Printing, Counters & Accessories, and One Choice Products (bulk/value program).

title: FAQ - Orders & Order Status (Detailed)
content:
Orders & Order Status FAQs (Detailed):

Q: I need a graphic print with hardware. How do I order it?
A: Purchase the graphic package for the product you want, then upload your artwork via the order confirmation page or later through My Account under the Graphics link.

Q: How do I ensure my graphic order arrives on time?
A: Submit your artwork before noon, 12:00 PM PT on the day you place your order, and approve your proofs before 3:00 PM PT. Turnaround time begins after proof approval, not when the order is placed.

Q: How do I order custom print without hardware?
A: Select 'graphic only' options on product pages, or visit the Printing page (wsdisplay.com/Printing/custom-banners) to order custom printing by the square foot on various materials.

Q: I want to reorder - do you save my order history?
A: Order history is available in My Account, but you must repurchase items individually. Art files are saved for three months only, after which they are deleted.

Q: How do I change quantities or cancel items on my order?
A: Once processing begins, orders cannot be edited online. You must call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, to request changes or cancellations.

Q: When will my order ship?
A: Hardware-only orders ship same-day if ordered by 3:00 PM PT (California warehouse) or 12:00 PM Noon PT (Pennsylvania warehouse). Graphic orders ship at end-of-day on the final production day, which is typically 2 business days after proof approval.

Q: When will my order arrive?
A: Arrival depends on your shipping method and destination. Use the UPS transit calculator or check your tracking information for estimated delivery dates. UPS delivers Monday through Friday unless Saturday delivery is specifically requested.

Q: Has my order shipped? How do I track it?
A: Click 'My Account,' then 'Review orders / track packages' to access your UPS tracking details and shipment status.

Q: My order never arrived. Now what?
A: Contact customer service immediately at 800-640-9544, press 1, with your order number ready. They will investigate the shipment status with UPS.

Q: An item is missing from my shipment. Now what?
A: Have your order number ready and contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, to report the missing item.

Q: My product is missing parts. Now what?
A: Check the spec sheet on the Templates page for the complete parts list for your product. If parts are confirmed missing, contact customer service with your order number.

Q: When will a backorder item arrive?
A: Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, or email info@wsdisplay.com for estimated arrival dates on backordered items.

Q: How do I place an order for One Choice Products?
A: One Choice orders MUST be placed on the website only - no phone or email orders are accepted. Orders must be placed before 12:00 PM PST, with graphic approval required by 4:00 PM PT for next-business-day shipping. No shipping upgrades are available on One Choice products.

Q: Can I order to multiple addresses?
A: Yes. The first 5 addresses have no handling fee. For 6 or more addresses, there is a $3.00 fee per additional location.

title: FAQ - Graphic Art Files & Design
content:
Graphic Art Files & Design FAQs:

Q: How do I upload art?
A: After ordering, click 'upload file' on the order confirmation page, or log in later and use the Graphics link in My Account to upload your artwork.

Q: What art file formats do you accept?
A: PDF (recommended and preferred), EPS, TIFF, Adobe Illustrator (.AI), and Adobe Photoshop (.PSD). PDF should be print-optimized. PSD files should be flattened.

Q: What resolution does my art need to be at?
A: 125 DPI for the overall document. Images within the artwork should be at 300 DPI minimum for best quality. Vector elements remain sharp at any size.

Q: What color mode do you print in?
A: CMYK. All artwork must be submitted in CMYK color mode. RGB files will not print accurately and colors may shift.

Q: What does approving my graphic proof mean?
A: Approving your proof confirms you are aware of and accept the image quality based on the file(s) you provided. Production turnaround begins after proof approval.

Q: Where can I find templates and spec sheets?
A: Visit the Templates page on the website to download templates, setup instructions, and specification sheets for all products. Templates are also available through the Exhibit Book Download.

Q: How do I request graphic design service?
A: Purchase a graphic product, type 'Need graphic design help' in the order notes during checkout, then contact customer service with your sales order number to coordinate with the design team.

Q: What will graphic design charges be?
A: Graphic design is charged at $65 per hour with a minimum charge of 30 minutes ($32.50). Design service levels include Express, Custom, and Advanced options.

Q: How do I order a PMS color match?
A: Visit the PMS Color Match page on the website, select your desired colors, and provide your PMS numbers in the order notes. PMS color matching adds 1-2 business days to production time. Note that printing occurs in CMYK conversion, so exact PMS matches are approximated.

Q: Do you have free printed swatches?
A: Yes, you can order free material sample swatches via the Free Sample Swatch page on the website.

Q: What is the True Black formula for artwork?
A: For Stretch, Multi-Stretch, and Roll Up materials: C:0, M:0, Y:0, K:100. For all other materials: C:75, M:75, Y:75, K:100.

Q: Do I need to outline my fonts?
A: Yes, outline all fonts before submission to prevent missing or substituted fonts during output.

Q: Should images be embedded or linked?
A: All images must be embedded in the file (no linked files). Remove template lines, crop marks, and guidance layers before uploading.

title: FAQ - Graphic Turnaround & Rush Orders
content:
Graphic Turnaround & Rush Orders FAQs:

Q: What is my graphic turnaround time?
A: Most graphic turnaround times are two (2) business days of production time after proof approval. Some complex items or large-format products may take longer. One Choice products ship next business day when artwork is approved by 4:00 PM PT.

Q: How does turnaround time work for quantity orders?
A: Each item has different turnaround times based on product type and complexity. Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, for details on your specific order.

Q: Does hardware ship the same day?
A: Yes, hardware-only orders ship same day, but they must be purchased by 3:00 PM PT (California warehouse) or by 12:00 PM Noon PT (Pennsylvania warehouse).

Q: Are there limits to getting a rush?
A: Yes, time and quantity constraints apply. Rush availability depends on current workload and production capacity. Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, to check availability.

Q: Do all products allow a rush?
A: Yes, all products can potentially be rushed, subject to current workload and available production time.

Q: How do I order a rush?
A: Some products offer set-priced rush options directly on the product page under 'Graphic Turnaround Time.' Select the rush option and add it to your cart. For products without online rush options, call customer service.

Q: How fast does a rush push my order ahead?
A: A next-day rush ships the following business day if the proof is approved by 3:00 PM PT. Two-day and three-day rush options follow accordingly (ship in 2 or 3 business days after approval).

Q: Do rush fees apply per item or once?
A: Rush fees apply per item, not per order. Each item in your order that needs to be rushed will have its own rush fee.

Q: I need this shipped out today. Is this possible?
A: Maybe - it depends on the product type, current time, and production workload. Call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, to ask about same-day rush options.

Q: Will there be times when a rush is not available?
A: Yes, rush availability varies depending on current production workload. During peak busy periods, rush options may be limited or unavailable.

title: FAQ - Payment, Billing & Promotions
content:
Payment, Billing & Promotions FAQs:

Q: What are my payment choices?
A: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Net 30 (with credit approval), Check, or Cash.

Q: Do I have to pay sales tax?
A: Tax applies to blind shipments to California, Pennsylvania, and Hawaii unless you provide a valid resale certificate before the order is finalized and invoiced. WS Display collects sales tax in states where they have nexus including: Arizona, Arkansas, California, Connecticut, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Kentucky, Maryland, Michigan, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Washington, West Virginia, and Wisconsin.

Q: How do I get a copy of my receipt/invoice?
A: Log in to My Account and under 'My Orders,' click 'Print invoices' to view and print your receipts.

Q: When will my credit appear?
A: Credits appear within 7-10 business days, or after returned items are received and processed.

Q: When will my credit card be charged?
A: Your credit card is charged immediately when the order is placed. Additional charges may accrue until shipment for rush fees, shipping upgrades, or other add-ons.

Q: What promotions do you have?
A: WS Display offers monthly specials, a 15% showroom discount (when your company displays the WS Display logo at minimum 6-inch size), and the WS Prime program for free ground shipping on eligible products.

Q: How do I use a coupon/promo code?
A: Add items to your cart, enter the promo code in the field below the cart items, and click 'Apply' to see the discount reflected.

Q: What does prepaid by check mean?
A: Prepaid by check means payment via check must be received before the order ships. This option is used by Net 30 customers or those picking up orders locally.

Q: What is Net 30?
A: Net 30 is a line of store credit through WS Display which starts at $2,500. It allows approved customers to pay their invoice within 30 days of the order date. You must apply and be approved for Net 30 terms.

Q: How do I apply for Net 30 credit?
A: Click the Forms link on the website to access the credit application form. Complete and submit it for review.

Q: Does California have special tax rules?
A: Yes, California has a 10% Markup Rule: For out-of-state resellers without California resale certificates, tax is calculated on the retail selling price plus a markup of 10 percent.

title: FAQ - Shipping & Delivery (Detailed)
content:
Shipping & Delivery FAQs (Detailed):

Q: Can I ship an order to multiple addresses?
A: Yes. The first 5 addresses have no handling fee. For 6 or more addresses, there is a $3.00 fee per additional address/location.

Q: What shipping carrier do you use?
A: WS Display uses UPS as the primary shipping carrier.

Q: How much will shipping cost me?
A: Shipping cost depends on package weight, quantity, daily UPS rates, which warehouse ships the order, and the destination address. You can calculate the exact cost during checkout before placing your order.

Q: Does UPS charge a residential fee?
A: Yes, residential deliveries cost more than commercial deliveries due to single-location delivery logistics versus commercial route addresses.

Q: What free shipping programs exist?
A: WS Display offers four free shipping programs: (1) WS Prime - free ground shipping on eligible products for enrolled members (wsprime.com), (2) One Choice Products - free bulk ground shipping to a single address in the US, (3) Free shipping on certain items like Scrim Vinyl and Blankets, and (4) Free bulk shipping on yard signs.

Q: Do you ship internationally?
A: Yes, WS Display ships directly to Canada and Puerto Rico. For all other international destinations, customers must arrange their own shipping carrier and handle all customs documentation.

Q: Do you blind/drop ship?
A: Yes. Enter the desired ship-to address at checkout and note 'Blind Ship' in the payment notes section. Blind shipping is provided free of charge - no extra fees.

Q: What expedited shipping options exist?
A: UPS 3 Day Select, UPS 2nd Day Air, UPS Next Day Air, and other premium UPS options are available during checkout.

Q: How do I upgrade shipping after placing my order?
A: Call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1. Additional shipping charges will apply for the upgrade.

Q: Is Saturday delivery available?
A: Saturday delivery may be available depending on your destination and shipment timing. Call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, for availability and pricing.

Q: When will my order be delivered?
A: UPS delivers Monday through Friday unless Saturday delivery is specifically requested and available. Delivery dates depend on the shipping method selected and your location relative to the shipping warehouse.

Q: Can I pick up my order?
A: Yes, in-store pickup is available at two locations: Carlsbad, CA (5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008) and Carlisle, PA (6 Pine Hill Dr., Carlisle, PA).

Q: How do I place a pick up order?
A: Select the warehouse under 'Shipping From,' add items to cart, enter your destination info, select 'In-Store Pickup' as the shipping method, and complete checkout.

Q: When can I pick up my order?
A: Between 3:00 PM and 5:00 PM on your scheduled pickup day. If you cannot make that window, you can pick up during regular business hours on subsequent days.

Q: Can I use my own UPS account for shipping?
A: Yes. Select 'Use Own UPS Account' at checkout and enter your UPS account number and billing address in the payment notes.

Q: Can I use my own freight carrier (FedEx, DHL, etc.)?
A: Yes. Call customer service, place an order selecting 'In-Store Pickup,' note your carrier details in payment notes, confirm the ship date, and email your shipping documents to info@wsdisplay.com.

Q: Can you ship to military bases overseas?
A: No, WS Display cannot ship to overseas military bases (APO/FPO addresses).

Q: Which warehouses do you ship from?
A: WS Display ships from two warehouses: Carlsbad, CA (5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008) and Carlisle, PA (6 Pine Hill Dr., Carlisle, PA). Hardware same-day shipping cutoff is 3:00 PM PT from California and 12:00 PM Noon PT from Pennsylvania.

title: FAQ - Returns, Warranties & Damage Claims
content:
Returns, Warranties & Damage Claims FAQs:

Q: What is your return policy?
A: Graphic/printed items cannot be returned due to their custom nature. Hardware items may be returned within 30 days of receipt in original, unmarked packaging for exchange or refund.

Q: What do I do if my product arrives damaged?
A: Contact customer service within 48 hours of delivery via email at info@wsdisplay.com. Include your order number, photos of the damage, and a description of the issue. Timely reporting is critical for processing damage claims.

Q: Where can I contact you regarding returns or warranty?
A: Email returns@wsdisplay.com for the fastest response on return and warranty inquiries. You can also call 800-640-9544, press 1.

Q: What do I do if my product gets damaged within warranty?
A: Email info@wsdisplay.com with your order number, details about the damage, and photos. The warranty team will review your claim and advise on next steps.

Q: I received the wrong product. Now what?
A: Contact customer service within 48 hours via email at info@wsdisplay.com with your order number and details about what you received versus what you ordered.

Q: What is your warranty?
A: WS Display offers two warranty types: (1) 1-Year Warranty against manufacturing defects, and (2) Lifetime Warranty against manufacturing defects on select premium products. Check individual product pages for which warranty applies to each product. For example, select SilverStep retractable banner stands carry a lifetime warranty.

Q: Is your site secure?
A: Yes. The WS Display website is protected with SSL (secure socket layer) encryption for all transactions and account information.

Q: Can I return a custom printed graphic?
A: No. Due to the custom nature of printed graphics, all graphic orders are final sale and cannot be returned. Make sure to carefully review and approve your proof before production begins.

Q: What if my graphic print has a quality issue?
A: Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, or email info@wsdisplay.com with your order number and photos of the issue. The team will review whether it is a production defect or an issue with the submitted artwork.

title: FAQ - Sales & Marketing Tools
content:
Sales & Marketing Tools FAQs:

Q: What is ExhibitBook?
A: ExhibitBook is a non-branded resource guide created for WS Display distributors. It contains product information, setup instructions, and templates but is completely void of any pricing, making it safe to share with end-users and clients.

Q: Where can I find instructional videos?
A: Visit Exhibit Book Videos on YouTube (youtube.com/@WSDisplayOfficial) for non-branded instructional content including product setup guides, webinars on extrusion systems, and more.

Q: What is WS Prime?
A: WS Prime is a premium program offering free ground shipping to distributors and end-users on eligible products. Enroll at wsprime.com.

Q: How can I use your website as a job bidding tool?
A: Select your ship-from warehouse location, add products to cart, enter delivery details, and view wholesale pricing and shipping costs. This gives you accurate cost data to build quotes for your clients.

Q: How do I request a catalog with prices?
A: Email info@wsdisplay.com with your email address and specify which catalog you need. Catalogs are available as No Price PDF or Editable/Fillable versions.

Q: What is the showroom discount?
A: The showroom discount is 15% off most products when your company displays the WS Display logo prominently at a minimum 6-inch size in your showroom or workspace. Contact your rep to set up the discount.

Q: Where do I find graphic templates and specs?
A: Visit the Templates page on wsdisplay.com or access them through the Exhibit Book Download. Templates include setup instructions, specification sheets, and graphic file dimensions for all products.

Q: How do I apply for Net 30 credit?
A: Click the Forms link on the website to access and download the credit application. Complete it and submit for review. Net 30 credit starts at $2,500.

Q: Do you offer volume pricing?
A: Yes. Some products show quantity discounts directly online on the product page. For other products or large custom orders, complete the large-quantity quote form and email it to bd@wsdisplay.com (Business Development).

Q: How do I get a large-quantity quote?
A: Email bd@wsdisplay.com with completed form details describing your quantity needs, products, and timeline. Expect a response within approximately 24 hours.

Q: Are free material swatches available?
A: Yes, you can order free printed material sample swatches via the Free Sample Swatch page on the website to see and feel the print quality and material before ordering.

Q: What catalogs are available?
A: Available catalogs include: WS Catalog (comprehensive), One Choice Product Catalog, MODCO Look Book & Catalog, Resort Extrusions Catalog, Tower Catalog, QSEG Quick Wall System, Non-Brand Catalog, Table Throw Catalog, Rental Look Book, and PPE Products. All available in No Price PDF or Editable versions.

Q: Is there an online design tool?
A: Yes, WS Display offers Flyer Maker, an online design tool to generate professional-quality designs in minutes with customizable templates for products like Casita Canopy Tents and Wallbox Towers.

title: FAQ - Contact Information & Hours
content:
Contact Information & Hours FAQs:

Q: What are your business hours?
A: California Office: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST. Phone & Chat support: 5:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST. Pennsylvania Warehouse: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST. Phone & Chat support: 8:00 AM - 9:00 PM EST.

Q: What is your main phone number?
A: 800-640-9544. Press 1 for Customer Service. Press 2 for Graphics Department.

Q: What is your email address?
A: Main email: info@wsdisplay.com. Returns email: returns@wsdisplay.com. Business Development: bd@wsdisplay.com.

Q: What is your physical address?
A: Main office: 5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008. Pennsylvania warehouse: 6 Pine Hill Dr., Carlisle, PA.

Q: What departments can I reach?
A: Customer Service (Ext. 110-145): Handles order status, claims, and customer relations. Graphics/Design Department (Ext. 201-211): Handles artwork, proofing, and design services, managed by Orlando C. Business Development (Ext. 1175): Led by Damaris V. and team, supporting sales inquiries. Project Development: Led by Mike M., VP of Sales, with regional managers and project coordinators handling custom builds and trade show projects. Returns Processing: Direct inquiries to returns@wsdisplay.com.

Q: How do I reach customer service directly?
A: Call 800-640-9544, press 1. Customer service representatives include John M. (760-465-4090) and Kristian R. (760-309-1629).

Q: Where can I find you on social media?
A: Facebook: facebook.com/wsdisplay. Twitter: twitter.com/wsdisplay. Instagram: instagram.com/wsdisplay/. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/wsdisplay/. YouTube: youtube.com/@WSDisplayOfficial.

Q: What is your website?
A: www.wsdisplay.com. WS Prime program: www.wsprime.com.
